heading: Federal land bank association capitalization
label: 2094 Federal land bank association capitalization
text: In accordance with , the Federal land bank association shall provide, through its bylaws and subject to Farm Credit Administration regulations, for its capitalization and the manner in which its stock shall be issued, held, transferred, and retired and its earnings distributed.section 2154a of this title
